Academics · CentralHub

Secondary Checkpoint Pacing Guide

Manage chapter and topic structure for Secondary Checkpoint subjects. Changes are reflected in the Teachers Hub for all staff.

Back to Academics

Access Restricted

This page is only available to Central Admins.

Class Groups

Define class groups for each subject. Teachers can switch between groups to track progress independently (e.g. 7A vs 7B).

Objective Code Format

Define the objective code prefixes used for each subject. These appear as filter chips in the Teachers Hub Coverage Report (e.g. C1.1, E2.3).

Used to detect codes like C1.1 or E2.3 in objectives. Leave blank to auto-detect.

Applies to all subjects. Teachers Hub uses this to calculate overdue/behind alerts.

Cambridge Secondary Checkpoint Mathematics

1112 · Year 7–8
